name: World War II: Secrets from Above
original_name: World War II: Secrets from Above
overview: As we fly above the infamous battle sites of D-Day and Dunkirk, soar over hidden Nazi bunkers, and glide across lost battleships and sunken shipwrecks – this new series exposes secrets of World War Two - in a brand-new way.

trailers.title: World War II: Secrets From Above - Trailer
